status.viewModeTitle: Modified file list view mode (persisted in localStorage)
status.viewModePathTooltip: Show full path on one line (persisted in localStorage)
status.hunkUnstageTooltip: Hunk-level unstage — select specific lines to unstage
status.hunkStageTooltip: Hunk-level stage — select specific lines to stage
status.resolveTitle: Open 3-way merge editor (in-app, with AI suggestion)

restore.worktreeMessage:
Restore worktree only from index.
• Index (staged) preserved
• {n} file(s): '{sample}' and others
• Cannot be undone
restore.fromHeadMessage:
Restore both worktree + index from HEAD.
• Staged changes are also discarded
• {n} file(s): '{sample}' and others
• Cannot be undone
restore.fromCommitMessage:
Restore both worktree + index from '{source}'.
• All current changes (incl. staged) discarded
• {n} file(s): '{sample}' and others
• Cannot be undone
restore.promptCommitMessage: Source commit (SHA / branch / tag) — empty to cancel

hunkStage.noChangeMessage: No stageable change in selected lines
hunkStage.ctxRestoreWorktreeHunk: Restore hunk to worktree (keep index, discard change)
hunkStage.restoreConfirmMessage:
Discard {what} change from worktree.
• File: {path}
• Index (staged) preserved
• Cannot be undone
hunkStage.emptyDiff: No change or binary / mode change.

toolbar.undoTitle: Undo last commit/amend (--soft, working tree preserved)
toolbar.redoTitle: Redo previous undo (reset/checkout only, working tree preserved)
toolbar.branchTitle: Switch branch panel + create new branch
toolbar.stashEmpty: No working tree changes to stash
toolbar.popTitle: Apply + drop the latest stash{'@'}0 ({n} total)

welcome.intro: Alternative to GitKraken / Tower / Fork — Tauri ~30MB native + Korean-safe + free AI. Step through to set up your environment.
welcome.h1Body: Native-light vs Electron 200MB+. Rust backend + WebView.
welcome.h2Body: Conventional Commits visual width (Korean=2) / commit encoding 12+ field overrides.
welcome.h3Body: Delegates to Claude / Codex CLI — free vs GitKraken $7/mo. 6 composables (commit/PR/explain/resolve/review).
welcome.h4Body: Split company Gitea + personal GitHub PAT. v0.4 — per-repo forge_account override.
welcome.h5Body: Focus Not Obscured / Target Size 24×24 / prefers-reduced-motion / aria-* 115.

theme.intro: Auto-syncs with OS settings. Explicit selection also available.
theme.systemHint: Settings → UI Customization for system follow / custom theme JSON.

quickstart.intro: Add your first repository or start the GitKraken migration.

contextMenu.confirmDestructiveMessage: '{label}' may be hard to undo. Continue?

cmdToast.ghActionsBody:
CI run status indicator (per-branch / per-PR).
Progress: docs/plan/05
cmdToast.linearJiraBody:
Auto-map commit / branch name to issues.
Progress: docs/plan/05
cmdToast.webhookBody:
Webhook for bulk fetch / push / PR merge results.
Progress: docs/plan/05

cooldown.title: AI quota limit reached
cooldown.message: Claude / Codex CLI hit a quota / rate limit. Try again in about {sec} seconds. (cooldown in progress)

confirm.title: Confirm
confirm.deleteBranchForceHint: This branch has unmerged commits — using -D (force).
confirm.switchWithChangesMessage:
{n} files have uncommitted changes — checkout '{name}' anyway?
• git checkout may refuse (overwrite risk)
• Stash first for safety
confirm.popStashMessage:
Pop stash{'@'}{idx}?
• Applies to working tree + removes stash
• On conflict, stash remains but working tree may be dirty
confirm.dropStashMessage:
Drop stash{'@'}{idx}?
• Permanently removes the stash (no apply)
• Cannot be undone
confirm.popLatestStashMessage:
Pop stash{'@'}0?
• Applies to working tree + removes stash
• On conflict, stash remains but working tree may be dirty
• (Remaining stashes: {remaining})
confirm.stashAllMessage:
Stash current working tree changes?
• No message — pushed immediately
• Will appear as stash{'@'}0 in stash list
confirm.undoMessage:
Undo the last action?
• Only commit / amend handled automatically (reset --soft HEAD{'@'}{1} — preserves working tree)
• merge / rebase / branch switch redirect to ReflogModal
confirm.redoMessage:
Redo the last undo?
• Only handles automatically when previous reflog action was reset/checkout
• Otherwise redirects to ReflogModal
• Checkout redo requires a clean working tree
confirm.deleteRemoteBranchMessage:
Delete remote branch 'origin/{name}'?
(This cannot be undone)
confirm.amendMessage:
This commit may already be pushed.
Amending will require a force-push. Continue?
confirm.forcePushMessage:
Force push overwrites remote history.
If teammates are working on this branch, their work may be lost. Continue?
confirm.hardResetMessage: All working-tree changes (except untracked) will be lost. Continue?
confirm.discardAllMessage:
Discard changes in {n} files?
(This cannot be undone)
confirm.deleteLocalTagMessage:
Delete local tag '{name}'?
(Remote tag is separate)
confirm.checkoutTagMessage:
Checkout tag '{name}'?
(This will result in detached HEAD)
confirm.aiSendMessage:
PR diff will be sent to an external LLM.
Did you verify your company's security policy?
confirm.aiPrBodyMessage:
Branch commits + diff stat will be sent to an external LLM.
Did you verify your company's security policy?
confirm.aiCommitMessage:
Staged diff will be sent to an external LLM.
Did you verify your company's security policy?
confirm.aggressiveGcMessage: Aggressive gc may take a long time. Continue?
confirm.activateProfileTitle: ⚠ Activate profile — overwrites global git config
confirm.activateProfileMessage:
Activating '{name}' will immediately overwrite ~/.gitconfig user.name / user.email / user.signingKey / core.sshCommand.

Other git GUIs / CLI / IDEs are affected (terminal git commit, VSCode, IntelliJ, company workflow).

Continue?
confirm.activateProfileGenericMessage:
Activating this profile will immediately overwrite ~/.gitconfig user.name / user.email / user.signingKey / core.sshCommand.

Other git GUIs / CLI / IDEs are affected.

Continue?
confirm.amendPushedMessage:
This commit may already be pushed.
• ahead = 0 (all local commits are on remote)
• Amending changes the last commit hash → teammates' fetch may conflict
• Resolution: push then force-push (--force-with-lease) required
confirm.rebaseOntoMessage:
Rebase current HEAD onto '{name}'?
⚠ On conflict, --continue is required.
confirm.revertCommitMessage:
Revert commit {sha}?
(A new commit will be created)
confirm.resetCommitMessage: Reset current HEAD to commit {sha} with --{mode}?
confirm.discardFileMessage:
Discard changes to '{path}'?
This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteWorkspaceMessage:
Delete workspace '{name}'?
(Repos are preserved — only the group is removed)
confirm.takeFullSideMessage: Overwrite all of {path} with the '{side}' version and stage. Continue?
confirm.aiResolveConflictMessage:
Conflict file (ours/theirs/base) will be sent to an external LLM.
Did you verify your company's security policy?
confirm.reflogResetMessage: Reset current branch to reflog entry '{label}'?
confirm.headResetMixedMessage:
Reset HEAD to {sha} with --mixed.
Working tree changes are preserved; any commits/pushes since then remain in reflog and can be restored. Continue?
confirm.mergeAcceptAllMessage: Auto-apply non-conflicting hunks, leaving only conflict regions?
confirm.createPrAuthMessage:
The current profile may not have PR creation permission.
Continue anyway? (You may need to add a token if it fails)

forgeSection.title: Forge accounts
forgeSection.tokenStorageNote: Tokens are stored in the OS keychain (Windows Credential Manager / macOS Keychain). DB only holds the keychain reference.

profilesSection.title: Profiles
profilesSection.description: Personal ↔ Work 1-click toggle. When activated, global git config (user.name / user.email / user.signingkey) is applied.
profilesSection.labelSshPath: SSH key path (memo only — ssh-agent auto in v1.x)

general.title: General
general.description: Core toggles ported from GitKraken Preferences > General. Persisted in localStorage.
general.rememberTabsHint: Restore last tabs when switching profiles
general.futureNote: v1.x planned: auto-delete .orig / Longpaths / AutoCRLF / Logging level.

editor.title: Editor / Terminal
editor.description: Editor options currently include ⌘=/-/0 (Zoom) and Diff 3-mode toggle (Hunk/Inline/Context). Additional options (font / EOL / line-num / wrap) are v1.x.
editor.diffModeRow: · Diff mode: Hunk / Inline / Context toggle in CommitDiffModal

external.label: External Editor
external.hint: When selected, right-click / shortcut (v0.5+) opens the active repo in the external editor. Uses URI scheme — depends on OS handler being registered.

editor.futureNote: v1.x: External diff/merge tool launch, Terminal font/cursor settings.

maintenanceSection.description: Run git gc / fsck / lfs install on the active repository. Large repos may take several minutes.
maintenanceSection.noActiveRepoWarning: ⚠ No active repository. Select a repo from the Sidebar.
maintenanceSection.futureNote: v1.x candidates: incremental gc progress / scheduled auto-maintenance.

uiCustomization.title: UI Customization
uiCustomization.description: Theme / Zoom / Sidebar / Detail panels via ⌘ shortcuts + localStorage. Additional toggles in v1.x.
uiCustomization.miniSidebarHint: Left sidebar 9 sections (Miller 7±2 upper bound) — hide rarely used sections.
uiCustomization.futureNote: v1.x: graph metadata toggle / notification position.
uiCustomization.customThemeDescription: Custom theme was temporarily disabled in GitKraken 11.8 — git-fried adopts it as simple CSS variable export/import.

pluginIntegration.title: Plugin / Integration
pluginIntegration.description: External tool connections (CI / issue tracker / notification / sync). Only plugins matching git-fried's local-first / CLI-delegate identity are exposed here.
pluginIntegration.exclusionNote: ❌ Intentionally excluded: Cloud Workspace / Cloud AI / proprietary LLM infra / Diagram. (Cloud-Free identity — design §8-6).
pluginIntegration.gpgDetail: commit / tag auto GPG signing (per-repo toggle)

sidebar.managementTitle: Manage all repos (Browse / Clone / project groups) — Cmd+Shift+R

emptyState.noActiveRepoDescription: Select an active repo from top tabs or the 'Repos' page

worktree.title: Worktree
worktree.lockPromptMessage: Lock reason for '{path}' (optional, e.g. external disk / inactive)
worktree.emptyHint: Enter a path above and click add to create a new worktree.

tag.ctxHint: ⌥ Right-click: Push / Checkout / Create branch / Copy SHA / Delete

pr.title: Pull Requests
pr.emptyOpenDesc: Switch filter to closed / all, or create a new PR.
pr.suggestionTitle: 💡 Code suggestion — propose new code for a specific diff line
pr.suggestionNewCodePlaceholder: New code (replaces the line) — multi-line OK
pr.suggestionFooterHint: GitHub and Gitea both wrap in ```suggestion format. Line is on RIGHT side (new code) of PR diff.
pr.aiReviewTitle: {cli} CLI analyzes PR diff and suggests review
pr.reviewBodyPlaceholder: Review body (optional for Comment, recommended for Approve / Request changes)

stash.title: Stash
stash.newFormCollapsed: (new stash form collapsed — right-click to expand)
stash.stagedOnlyTitle: Stash index (staged) only. Worktree (unstaged) preserved. Requires Git 2.35+.
stash.toBranchTitle: Recover this stash to a new branch (from stash base)
stash.toBranchAria: Pop stash{'@'}{idx} to a new branch
stash.branchPromptMessage: New branch name (created from stash base)
stash.editMessageMessage: Saving moves the new entry to stash{'@'}0; the original is dropped.
stash.applyFileTitle: Apply only this file to the working tree

stashList.title: Stashes
stashList.notInGraphBody: No matching stash commit in current graph (limit) — use full Stash panel (⌘3)

forgeAccount.label: Forge account
forgeAccount.hint: Leave empty to use active Profile default
forgeAccount.overrideActive: This repository overrides the active Profile default
forgeAccount.savedBody: Forge account for this repository has been applied.

clone.filterHint: e.g., blob:none, blob:limit=1m. Requires Git 2.19+ + server support.

preset.fullTitle: No options — all commits/blobs, all branches
preset.shallowTitle: depth=1 — only the most recent commit
preset.sparseDirsTitle: sparse-checkout cone — only the entered directories

compare.title: Compare
compare.modeToggleTitle: Diff = ref1..ref2 patch / Range Diff = compare patch series (review rebase or PR updates)

rangeDiff.promptInputs: Enter both refs to compare patch series (for rebase / PR update review)
rangeDiff.noEntries: No entries — refs are identical or base is too far apart
rangeDiff.interDiffSummary: Expand inter-diff (actual line changes for changed patches)

branchList.occupiedTitle:
{name} is occupied by another worktree — cannot checkout
Path: {path}

branchDragDrop.actionMessage:
{source} → {target}

  m = merge (switch to target + merge source)
  r = rebase (rebase source onto target)
  cancel = cancel

branch.title: Branches
branch.remoteManage: Manage remotes (add / remove / rename / change URL)
branch.explainBaseMessage: Which base do you want to compare branch {head} against?
branch.emptyHint: Enter a name in the input above and click + to create a new branch.
branch.emptyFilteredHint: No branches match the current filter. Try changing the filter or clearing hide/solo.

commitActions.createBranchMessage: Enter a name for the new branch from {sha}.
commitActions.createTagMessage: Enter a name for the new tag from {sha}.
commitActions.createTagAnnotatedMessage: Annotated message (leave empty for lightweight tag)

tagActions.createBranchMessage: Enter a new branch name from tag '{name}'.

reflog.recoverBranchMessage: Enter a name for the recovery branch from {sha}.

interactiveRebase.errNoRepoBody: Select a repo in the sidebar first.
interactiveRebase.setupHint: How many recent commits to edit? (1 ~ 50)
interactiveRebase.userInputWaiting: Waiting for user input (edit action, etc.).

commitDetail.toastAiUnavailableBody: Install Claude or Codex CLI and retry

commitInput.errFetchLastFailed: Failed to fetch last commit message
commitInput.errCommitInvalidBody: Empty message or repo not selected

aiResult.timeout: No response within 60 seconds. Check CLI status or retry.

branchActions.toastPushRemoteForbidden: Remote branches are not push targets
branchActions.confirmCherryMessage: Cherry-pick the tip commit ({sha}) of {branch} onto HEAD?

commitDiff.selectFirst: Select a commit from the graph first. (J/K or click)

global.help: This help (only works outside input focus)

layout.closeModal: Close active modal (priority over tab — use ⌘⇧W to close tab)

tabs.closeTab: Close active repo tab (tab variant of ⌘W)

repos.openGroupAllTitle: Open all {n} repos in '{label}' group as tabs

repos.bulkResultFailed: Recent bulk fetch — {n} failed, view details
repos.emptyDescription: Use [Browse] or [Clone] in the top-right to get started.

switcher.searchPlaceholder: Search repos... (name / path / owner) — Esc to close
